title: sonerila prostrata var. johorensis
intro: Sonerila prostrata var. johorensis, also known as Johore sonerila, is a plant species that belongs to the Sonerila genus of flowering plants. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides. The plant is known to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing fever, treating wounds, and preventing the growth of certain bacteria. In traditional herbal preparations, Sonerila prostrata var. johorensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
